tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro] (main piano riff)

[tab]e|---------------------------------------------|
B|-------8-10-12---8-10-12-10-8---8-10-12-10-8-|
G|-7-7-9---------9--------------9--------------|
D|---------------------------------------------| x2
A|---------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Harry Truman, Doris Day, Red China, Johnnie Ray[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
South Pacific, Walter Winchell, Joe DiMaggio[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
Joe McCarthy, Richard Nixon, Studebaker, television[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
North Korea, South Korea, Marilyn Monroe[/tab]


[Interlude]

[tab]e|---------------------------------------------|
B|-------8-10-12---8-10-12-10-8---8-10-12-10-8-|
G|-7-7-9---------9--------------9--------------|
D|---------------------------------------------|
A|---------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Rosenbergs, H-bomb, Sugar Ray, Panmunjom[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Brando, The King and I, and The Catcher in the Rye[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Eisenhower, vaccine, England's got a new queen[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Marciano, Liberace, Santayana goodbye[/tab]


[Chorus] (Play the Intro)

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
It was always burning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
No we didn't light it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Joseph Stalin, Malenkov, Nasser and Prokofiev[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Rockefeller, Campanella, Communist Bloc[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Dien Bien Phu falls, Rock Around the Clock[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Einstein, James Dean, Brooklyn's got a winning team[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Davy Crockett, Peter Pan, Elvis Presley, Disneyland[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Bardot, Budapest, Alabama, Krushchev[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Princess Grace, Peyton Place, trouble in the Suez[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
It was always burning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
No we didn't light it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]


[Verse 4]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Little Rock, Pasternak, Mickey Mantle, Kerouac[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Sputnik, Chou En-lai, Bridge on the River Kwai[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
Lebanon, Charles de Gaulle, California baseball[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Starkweather homicide, children of thalidomide[/tab]


[Verse 5]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Buddy Holly, Ben Hur, space monkey, Mafia[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Hula Hoops, Castro, Edsel is a no-go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
U-2, Syngman Rhee, payola and Kennedy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Chubby Checker, Psycho, Belgians in the Congo[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
It was always burning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 6]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Dylan, Berlin, Bay of Pigs invasion[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Ole Miss, John Glenn, Liston beats Patterson[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Pope Paul, Malcolm X, British politician sex[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
JFK blown away, what else do I have to say?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
It was always burning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]

No we didn't light it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 7]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Moonshot, Woodstock, Watergate, punk rock[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Foreign debts, homeless vets, AIDS, crack, Bernie Goetz[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Hypodermics on the shores, China's under martial law[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Rock and roller cola wars, I can't take it anymore[/tab]


[Outro]

It was always burning[/tab]
